channel.title: Miller Engelbrecht -- Security Research
channel.description: Security research on AI systems, bug bounty, and prompt injection by Miller Engelbrecht.

item.title: Clone This Repo and I Own Your Machine
item.description: How npm postinstall lifecycle hooks become a DNS command channel, silently executing attacker-controlled payloads on developer machines and CI runners.

item.title: The Commit Message You Can't Read
item.description: How invisible Unicode Tag characters can be embedded in git commit messages to inject hidden instructions into AI coding agents that process repository metadata.
